_comment: game-kit Railway multi-service template DESCRIPTOR. This is the source-of-truth topology + env wiring the Metatron MCP `provision_stack` tool (metatron#349) reads to instantiate the stack into the CREATOR'S OWN Railway workspace via Railway's API. The creator owns and pays for the project; Metatron never hosts or pays. Railway terminates TLS, so there is no Caddy (Caddy is only for the BYOC docker-compose path). Single-origin: `web` is the only PUBLIC service and proxies /api + /ws to the PRIVATE `api` service over Railway private networking (apps/web/nginx.conf.template).
name: game-kit
description: Full-stack web3 game (web + api + Postgres + Redis) on the Metatron rails.

variables._fromMetatronDevApp: OAUTH_CLIENT_ID, OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET, OAUTH_AUTHORIZE_URL, OAUTH_TOKEN_URL, OAUTH_USERINFO_URL, OAUTH_SCOPES, TRON_API_ORIGIN, PAYMENT_CHAIN, PAYMENT_TOKEN are injected by the MCP from the creator's Metatron developer app (metatron#349 env auto-wiring), not hard-coded here.

_playUrl: The storefront Play target is the web service's public domain (https://${{web.RAILWAY_PUBLIC_DOMAIN}}). The MCP registers it against the developer app (metatron#349/#350); the creator can later repoint a custom domain.
